lines.line: ខ្ញុំមិនមែនមក Diss តែខ្ញុំចេញមកដាស់
lines.translation: I did not come to Diss, but I came out to wake up
lines.phonetic: khnhom minmen mk diss  te khnhom chenh mk dasa

lines.line: ដេញជើង ឯងទាំងក្មេងទាំងចាស់
lines.translation: Chase your feet, young and old
lines.phonetic: denhcheung  eng teang kmeng teang chasa

lines.line: ពួកវានៅស្ទើរ ពួកវានៅស្ទើរណាស់
lines.translation: They are almost, they are almost
lines.phonetic: puokvea now staer  puokvea now staer nasa

lines.line: ទុកឱ្យខ្ញុំជាអ្នកធ្វើ ហើយចាំមើលឱ្យច្បាស់ (×2)
lines.translation: Let me be the doer and keep an eye out (× 2)
lines.phonetic: touk aoy khnhom chea anakathveu  haey cham meul aoy chbasa (×2)

lines.line: កើតតែមួយជាតិ ជាតិធាតុតែមួយចាន
lines.translation: Born one nation, one nation, one element, one plate
lines.phonetic: kaet temuoy cheate  cheate theato temuoy chan

lines.line: ខ្ញុំមួយរូប ដែលក្នុងចំណោមអ្នកក្លាហាន
lines.translation: I am one of the brave
lines.phonetic: khnhom muoy roub  del knongchamnaom anakaklahean

words.word: ក្នុងចំណោម

lines.line: គ្មានរឿងអ្វី ដែលខ្ញុំនេះធ្វើវាមិនបាន
lines.translation: No matter what I do it can not
lines.phonetic: kmean rueng avei  del khnhom nih thveu vea minban

lines.line: ធ្វើរឿងធំ ដែលអ្នកមិនដែលនឹកស្មាន
lines.translation: Do big things you never expected
lines.phonetic: thveu rueng thom  del anak min del nukasman

lines.line: មកម្ដងហើយ ខ្ញុំនៅតែមកម្ដងទៀត
lines.translation: Come again, I will come again
lines.phonetic: mk mdong haey  khnhom nowte mk mdongtiet

lines.line: ធ្វើច្រើនហើយ ខ្ញុំនៅតែធ្វើតទៀត
lines.translation: Do more and I will do more
lines.phonetic: thveu chraen haey  khnhom nowte thveu t tiet

lines.line: ពេលនេះចេញមកដេញ ចេញមកដាក់សម្ពាធ
lines.translation: Now come out, chase out, put pressure
lines.phonetic: pelnih chenh mk denh  chenh mk dak sampeath

lines.line: ឡើងមកវ៉ៃលើរេញ យើងបញ្ចេញគ្រប់ស្នៀត
lines.translation: Come up and lie on our backs, we show all tricks
lines.phonetic: laeng mk vai leu renh  yeung banhchenh krob sniet

lines.line: Straight from da block ប៉ះខ្ញុំអ្នកដឹងតែឆក់
lines.translation: Straight from da block touch me, you only know the shock
lines.phonetic: straight from da block  bah khnhom anakdoeng te chhk

lines.line: Uh I’m on the top ដេករាប់តែលុយកក់
lines.translation: Uh I’m on the top sleep only deposit
lines.phonetic: uh i’m on the top  dek reab te louy kk

lines.line: ពួកអាអ្នកស្អប់ឃើញហើយឈរសម្លក់
lines.translation: The haters see and stand staring
lines.phonetic: puok a anak saab kheunh haey chhr samlok

lines.line: បានត្រឹមតែសម្លឹងមិនបានមួយចំណិត ត្រសក់
lines.translation: Just can't look at a slice of cucumber
lines.phonetic: ban troemte samlung minban muoy chamnet trasak

lines.line: ក្មេងខ្ញុំព្រហើន ឱ្យតែហ៊ានបះជើង
lines.translation: My child is arrogant enough to dare to step on his feet
lines.phonetic: kmeng khnhom prohaen  aoy te han bahcheung

lines.line: តើអ្នកណាហ៊ានផ្គើន ឱ្យអ្នកឯងបះសក់
lines.translation: Who dares to make you shake your hair?
lines.phonetic: tae anaknea han phkaen  aoy anak eng bahsak

lines.line: មាត់ឡើងកម្ដៅ ព្រួសពាក្យដូចជាភ្លើង
lines.translation: Mouth heats up words like fire
lines.phonetic: meat laeng kamdow  pruosa peaky dauchchea phleung

lines.translation: Who wants to play or want to hang out?
lines.phonetic: tae anaknea chettasueng  chng leng ryy chng kdak

lines.line: ចង់លេងឬចង់ក្ដក់ ចង់លេងឬចង់ក្ដក់
lines.translation: Want to play or want to play Want to play or want to play
lines.phonetic: chng leng ryy chng kdak  chng leng ryy chng kdak

lines.line: តើអ្នកណាចិត្តសឿង ចង់លេងឬចង់ក្ដក់ ចង់លេង
lines.translation: Who wants to play or want to play
lines.phonetic: tae anaknea chettasueng  chng leng ryy chng kdak  chng leng

lines.line: ឬចង់ក្ដក់ ចង់លេងឬចង់ក្ដក់ ចង់លេងឬចង់ក្ដក់
lines.translation: Or want to want to play or want to want to play or want to want
lines.phonetic: ryy chng kdak  chng leng ryy chng kdak  chng leng ryy chng kdak

lines.line: តើអ្នកណាចិត្តសឿង ចង់លេងឬចង់ក្ដក់
lines.translation: Who wants to play or want to hang out?
lines.phonetic: tae anaknea chettasueng  chng leng ryy chng kdak

lines.translation: I did not come to Diss, but I came out to wake up
lines.phonetic: khnhom minmen mk diss  te khnhom chenh mk dasa

lines.line: ដេញជើង ឯងទាំងក្មេងទាំងចាស់
lines.translation: Chase your feet, young and old
lines.phonetic: denhcheung  eng teang kmeng teang chasa

lines.line: ពួកវានៅស្ទើរ ពួកវានៅស្ទើរណាស់
lines.translation: They are almost, they are almost
lines.phonetic: puokvea now staer  puokvea now staer nasa

lines.line: ទុកឱ្យខ្ញុំជាអ្នកធ្វើ ហើយចាំមើលឱ្យច្បាស់ (×2)
lines.translation: Let me be the doer and keep an eye out (× 2)
lines.phonetic: touk aoy khnhom chea anakathveu  haey cham meul aoy chbasa (×2)

lines.line: ពេលខ្លះមិនចង់ថា ពេលខ្លះមិនចង់ឃើញ
lines.translation: Sometimes do not want that sometimes do not want to see
lines.phonetic: pelokhleah min chngtha  pelokhleah min chng kheunh

lines.line: ហើយពេលខ្លះមិនចង់ដឹង ពេលខ្លះមិនចង់ឮ
lines.translation: And sometimes do not want to know, sometimes do not want to hear
lines.phonetic: haey pelokhleah min chng doeng  pelokhleah min chng lyy

lines.line: អត់សូវចេះរណប វាយអែបសុីអប
lines.translation: Not very good at hitting satellites
lines.phonetic: at sauv cheh ronb  veay eb so ei ab

lines.line: តែពេលពួកវាដាច់របប វាមកថាយើងឌឺ
lines.translation: But when they break free, it comes down to us.
lines.phonetic: te pel puokvea dach robb  vea mk tha yeung du

lines.line: ហើយនេះគឺជាសំឡេងក្មេងដែលឡើង Rank
lines.translation: And this is the voice of a child who ran up the ranks
lines.phonetic: haey nih kuchea saamleng kmeng del laeng rank

lines.line: ងើបទៅផ្សងព្រេង តាំងពីមុននូវមេឃភ្លឺ
lines.translation: Rise to adventure before the bright sky
lines.phonetic: ngeub tow phsaangopreng  tangpi moun nouv mekh phlu

lines.line: ឃើញពួកខ្ញុំ វាឡើងនៅហាងឆេង
lines.translation: See us it up at odds
lines.phonetic: kheunh puok khnhom  vea laeng now hangcheng

lines.line: បើសិនវាចង់មកលេង ថាខ្ញុំនេះមិនដែលព្រឺ
lines.translation: If it wants to come visit me
lines.phonetic: baesen vea chng mokleng  tha khnhom nih min del pru

lines.line: Straight out da block ប៉ះខ្ញុំវាដឹងតែឆក់
lines.translation: Straight out da block touches me, it only knows the shock
lines.phonetic: straight out da block  bah khnhom vea doeng te chhk

lines.line: ដើរមកផ្លូវឆ្ងាយ yeah, I walk how i talk
lines.translation: Walk a long way yeah, I walk how i talk
lines.phonetic: daeromk phlauv chhngay yeah, i walk how i talk

lines.line: ខ្ញុំមិនសុីទេ សាច់ដែលគេបង្កក
lines.translation: I do not eat frozen meat
lines.phonetic: khnhom min so ei te  sach delke bangkok

lines.line: គ្នាខ្ញុំដូចចចក យើងសុីតែសាច់ច្រឡក
lines.translation: We are like wolves, we eat only meat
lines.phonetic: knea khnhom dauch chachk  yeung so ei te sach chr lk

lines.line: Came a long way ថាខ្ញុំនេះមិនអាចនឹងបក
lines.translation: Came a long way that I can not translate
lines.phonetic: came a long way  tha khnhom nih min ach nung bk

lines.line: ខ្ញុំដេកគិត គុណ ចែក បូក ដក
lines.translation: I sleep thinking, multiplying, adding and subtracting
lines.phonetic: khnhom dek kit koun chek bauk dk

lines.line: អាណាពិត ហើយអាណាគេចង់សក
lines.translation: Ana is real and Ana wants to rest
lines.phonetic: ana pit  haey ana ke chng sak

lines.line: ខ្ញុំឱ្យវាឈឺចិត្ត បើសិនវាមកចង់ក្អក
lines.translation: I give it a go if it comes to coughing
lines.phonetic: khnhom aoy vea chhuchett  baesen vea mk chng kaak

lines.line: ព្រោះពួកវានៅភ្លើ នៅស្ទើរ នៅខ្លៅ
lines.translation: Because they are on fire, almost ignorant
lines.phonetic: proh puokvea now phleu  now staer  now khlaw

lines.line: ពួកអាខ្មោចឆៅ ចង់មកប៉ះគ្រូម៉ៅ
lines.translation: Raw ghosts want to touch Mao
lines.phonetic: puok akhmaoch chaw  chng mk bah krou maw

lines.line: ឱ្យឯងដេកអៀច ដល់ល្ងាច ថ្ងៃច័ន្ទ
lines.translation: Let you sleep until Monday evening
lines.phonetic: aoy eng dek iech  dl lngeach thngaichnt

lines.line: ថ្ងៃអង្គារ ថ្ងៃពុធ ដល់ថ្ងៃព្រហស្បតិ៍ សុក្រ សៅរ៏
lines.translation: Tuesday, Wednesday to Thursday, Friday, Saturday
lines.phonetic: thngaiangkear thngaipouth  dl thngai prohasbat sokr  saw ra

words.word: ថ្ងៃអង្គារ
ថ្ងៃព្រហស្បតិ៍

lines.line: ពួកអាត្រីផ្ទក់ វាមិនស្គាល់ភ្លើងក្ដៅ
lines.translation: The ants do not know the fire
lines.phonetic: puok a trei phtak  vea min skal phleung kdaw

lines.line: ចាប់វាយកទៅស្ងោរជ្រក់ ឬក៏វះងៀតឆៅ
lines.translation: Take it to boil or pickle raw
lines.phonetic: chab veay k tow sngaorochrok  ryyka veahngiet chaw

lines.line: ធ្វើឱ្យខ្ញុំនេះមួម៉ៅ ចិត្តខ្ញុំឡើងកម្ដៅ
lines.translation: Makes me angry, my heart heats up
lines.phonetic: thveu aoy khnhom nih muomaw  chett khnhom laeng kamdow

lines.line: ពេលនេះចង់និយាយថា
lines.translation: Now I want to say
lines.phonetic: pelnih chng niyeay tha

lines.line: ពួកអាខ្លះចង់ស្ទាវ តែពួកអាហ្នឹងស្ទាវជ័រ
lines.translation: Some people want hippies, but Ahnong hippies
lines.phonetic: puok a khleah chng stav  te puok ahnoeng stav chr

lines.line: GANG មកពីខាងណាអត់ដែលស្គាល់
lines.translation: GANG from which side do not know
lines.phonetic: gang  mk pi khangna at del skal

lines.line: គ្នាពួកបង ប្រើតែដៃដោះទាល់
lines.translation: You use only your bare hands
lines.phonetic: knea puok bng  brae te dai daoh teal

lines.line: ពួកអាក្មេងលេងដី កុំមកចង់ប៉ះពាល់ (×2)
lines.translation: Children playing on the ground, do not want to touch (× 2)
lines.phonetic: puok a kmeng leng dei  kom mk chng bahpeal (×2)

lines.line: មានកម្លាំងដូចតោ តាំងពីនៅតេះតះ
lines.translation: Strong as a lion from infancy
lines.phonetic: mean kamleang dauch tao  tangpi now tehtah

lines.line: អាវយឺត ខោសំយេះពាក់កាស
lines.translation: T-shirt, pants, headphones
lines.phonetic: avyut  khao saamyih peak kasa

lines.line: ឈានជើងចុះមកពីលើ G CLASS
lines.translation: Step down from G CLASS
lines.phonetic: chheancheung choh mk pileu g class

lines.line: Call ហៅគ្នីគ្នា តស់ទៅ Club ស្ដាប់បាស
lines.translation: Call each other to the club to listen to the bass
lines.phonetic: call  haw kniknea  tsa tow club  sdab basa

lines.line: ចាយលុយថ្មី ខ្ញុំមិនចាយលុយចាស់
lines.translation: Spend new money, I do not spend old money
lines.phonetic: chay louy thmei  khnhom min chay louy chasa

lines.phonetic: new diamond chain  louy khnhom chaul krasa

lines.translation: When I was young, my mind was old
lines.phonetic: nowkmeng  te koumnit khnhom chasa

lines.translation: Go on an adventure, I do not go crazy
lines.phonetic: chenh daerophsaangopreng  khnhom min daer phte sa phdasa

words.word: ផ្តេសផ្ដាស
